div.h2: Optimization of Recovery Time vs. Runtime Overhead

ol.li: Context Switching: Intervals < 5s incur a 15% context-switch penalty.
Log Bloat: Intervals > 120s lead to disk pressure on /var/lib/wal.
Optimal Constant: k = 0.5 * sqrt( (2 * C) / W ) where C is checkpoint cost and W is write rate.
